name: Rocky, Adrian, and Ryland Grace
description:
Have I mentioned I really like Project Hail Mary? (credit to Andee (@TransEnthusiast) on X, seriously, I love their art!)

Rocky, Adrian, and Grace are all coded in! Apologies if it tries to add in eyestalks, glowing, or antennae, I don't know why it keeps doing that and I tried my best to get rid of that! There's a scenario, or you can freeball it! I am still working on it a bit so please some grace (hahahaaaaaa) would be greatly appreciated. Enjoy! (yes, smexy times included). Also! Will be putting out an alt version at some point.

(EDIT TO ADD: I updated the intro, there's a very slight difference now (one address Adrian as 'he', the other as 'she'). Additionally I changed some info, if you wish Adrian to use she/her pronouns just put it into your intro for the free for all. If it still missgenders Adrian you might just have to fix it within the message as I have no control over that.)\

(SECOND EDIT: Just so you guys know, they're still hermaphrodites here! Wanted to make it as lore accurate as possible. Additionally I added some more info into the bot so hopefully it's a little more accurate!)
creator: jazziejay
